category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Skylighting as a Haskell syntax highlighting library with tokenizers derived from KDE syntax descriptions.
source_facts.description says it is a syntax highlighter using KDE XML syntax descriptions.
display_name_sources: Official Hackage and GitHub pages use skylighting.
docs_sources: Hackage package documentation provides generated API docs for skylighting 0.14.7: https://hackage.haskell.org/package/skylighting-0.14.7/docs/Skylighting.html.
Official repository README is available at https://github.com/jgm/skylighting#readme.
repo_sources: Hackage package metadata lists the source repo as https://github.com/jgm/skylighting.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from source_facts.homepage https://github.com/jgm/skylighting.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes a Haskell syntax highlighting library.
source_facts.description identifies syntax highlighting and KDE XML syntax descriptions.
